sentences.target: Je me suis tordu la cheville hier.
sentences.reading: /ʒə mə sɥi tɔʁdy la ʃə.vij jɛʁ/

translations.fr: Je me suis tordu la cheville hier.
translations.ipa: /ʒə mə sɥi tɔʁdy la ʃə.vij jɛʁ/
translations.de: Ich habe mir gestern den Knöchel verstaucht.
translations.it: Ieri mi sono storto la caviglia.
translations.vi: Hôm qua tôi bị trật mắt cá chân.
translations.nl: Ik heb gisteren mijn enkel verzwikt.
translations.hi: कल मैंने अपना टखना मोड़ लिया.
translations.ja: 昨日、足首をひねりました。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the grammatical subject.
Reflexive clitic pronoun, 1st person singular; part of the pronominal verb se tordre; indirect reflexive (the direct object is la cheville).
Auxiliary être, present 1st person singular; forms the passé composé of the pronominal verb.
Past participle serving as the main verb in the compound tense; invariable here since no preceding direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the direct object noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object referring to a body part.
Temporal adverb; modifies the whole clause to indicate time.

sentences.target: Tu peux mettre de la glace sur ta cheville.
sentences.reading: /ty pø mɛtʁ də la glas syʁ ta ʃə.vij/

translations.fr: Tu peux mettre de la glace sur ta cheville.
translations.ipa: /ty pø mɛtʁ də la glas syʁ ta ʃə.vij/
translations.en: You can put ice on your ankle.
translations.es: Puedes ponerte hielo en el tobillo.
translations.de: Du kannst Eis auf deinen Knöchel legen.
translations.it: Puoi mettere del ghiaccio sulla caviglia.
translations.ru: Ты можешь приложить лёд к щиколотке.
translations.pt: Você pode colocar gelo no tornozelo.
translations.he: אתה יכול לשים קרח על הקרסול.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể chườm đá lên mắt cá chân.
translations.nl: Je kunt ijs op je enkel leggen.
translations.hi: तुम टखने पर बर्फ लगा सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να βάλεις πάγο στον αστράγαλό σου.
translations.nb: Du kan legge is på ankelen.
translations.id: Kamu bisa menaruh es di pergelangan kaki kamu.
translations.sv: Du kan lägga is på fotleden.
translations.cs: Můžeš si na kotník dát led.
translations.da: Du kan lægge is på anklen.
translations.ja: 足首に氷を当ててもいいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Modal auxiliary, present 2nd person singular; expresses ability.
Main verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal pouvoir.
Preposition forming a partitive construction with la to indicate an indefinite quantity.
Definite article within the partitive de la; agrees feminine singular with glace.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the partitive noun phrase.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; feminine singular agreeing with cheville.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition sur.

sentences.target: Il manque une cheville pour cette étagère.
sentences.reading: /il mɑ̃k yn ʃə.vij puʁ sɛt etaʒɛʁ/

translations.fr: Il manque une cheville pour cette étagère.
translations.ipa: /il mɑ̃k yn ʃə.vij puʁ sɛt etaʒɛʁ/
translations.en: We’re missing a wall plug for this shelf.
translations.es: Nos falta un taco para esta estantería.
translations.de: Uns fehlt ein Dübel für dieses Regal.
translations.it: Manca un tassello per questa mensola.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个架子还差一个膨胀管。
translations.yue: 呢個層架仲差一個膨脹塞。
translations.ru: Для этой полки не хватает одного дюбеля.
translations.pt: Falta uma bucha para esta prateleira.
translations.tr: Bu raf için bir dübel eksik.
translations.vi: Thiếu một tắc kê cho cái kệ này.
translations.nl: We missen een muurplug voor deze plank.
translations.uk: Для цієї полички бракує одного дюбеля.
translations.hu: Ehhez a polchoz hiányzik egy tipli.
translations.hi: इस शेल्फ के लिए एक वॉल प्लग की कमी है.
translations.pl: Brakuje kołka rozporowego do tej półki.
translations.el: Λείπει ένα ούπα για αυτό το ράφι.
translations.nb: Det mangler en plugg til denne hyllen.
translations.id: Kurang satu fisher untuk rak ini.
translations.sv: Det saknas en plugg till den här hyllan.
translations.ro: Lipsește un diblu pentru acest raft.
translations.cs: Chybí jedna hmoždinka k této polici.
translations.da: Der mangler en plug til denne hylde.
translations.ja: この棚にはアンカーが一本足りない。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/dummy subject pronoun used with an impersonal construction.
Main verb, present 3rd person singular; expresses absence.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun cheville.
Common noun, feminine singular; logical subject (the item that is missing) in the impersonal construction.
Preposition introducing a purpose/complement.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies étagère.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of pour.

sentences.target: Mes chevilles gonflent après la course.

translations.fr: Mes chevilles gonflent après la course.
translations.es: Se me hinchan los tobillos después de correr.
translations.de: Meine Knöchel schwellen nach dem Laufen an.
translations.it: Le mie caviglie si gonfiano dopo la corsa.
translations.yue: 我跑完步之後個腳踝會腫。
translations.ru: У меня после бега отекают лодыжки.
translations.pt: Meus tornozelos incham depois de correr.
translations.vi: Mắt cá chân của tôi bị sưng sau khi chạy.
translations.nl: Mijn enkels zwellen op na het hardlopen.
translations.hi: दौड़ने के बाद मेरे टखने सूज जाते हैं.
translations.el: Οι αστράγαλοί μου πρήζονται μετά το τρέξιμο.
translations.nb: Anklene mine blir hovne etter løping.
translations.id: Pergelangan kaki saya bengkak setelah berlari.
translations.ro: Gleznele mele se umflă după alergare.
translations.ja: 走った後は足首が腫れます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular possessor; plural form agreeing with chevilles.
Common noun, feminine plural; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present 3rd person plural; intransitive here, describing the state change of the subject.
Preposition expressing temporal sequence.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun course.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition après.
